articles.title: Rivaroxaban Then Aspirin vs. Aspirin Alone after Total Hip or Knee Arthroplasty
articles.authors: Shivakumar S, Matino D, Zukor D, Kahn SR, Vincent G, Mundi R, Vendittoli PA, Refaei M, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Aspirin after an initial short course of rivaroxaban has been shown to be safe and effective for the prevention of venous thromboembolism after total hip or total knee arthroplasty, but uncertainty remains about the use of aspirin alone.
abstract.textZh: 初步短期服用利伐沙班後的阿司匹林已被證明對預防全臀或全膝關節置換術後的靜脈血栓栓塞是安全有效的，但單獨使用阿司匹林仍存在不確定性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this multicenter, double-blind, randomized, controlled trial, we assigned patients to receive once-daily thromboprophylaxis with either 81 mg of aspirin or 10 mg of oral rivaroxaban for the first 5 days after total hip or total knee arthroplasty. All the patients then received further thromboprophylaxis with 81 mg of aspirin daily for 9 additional days after knee arthroplasty and for 30 additional days after hip arthroplasty. Patients were followed for 90 days for symptomatic venous thromboembolism, which consisted of either proximal deep-vein thrombosis or pulmonary embolism (primary effectiveness outcome), and for bleeding complications (primary safety outcome). The noninferiority margin for aspirin alone as compared with rivaroxaban-aspirin was 0.7 percentage points.
abstract.textZh: 在這項多中心、雙盲、隨機、對照試驗中，我們將患者分配到全髖關節或全膝關節置換術後的前5天接受每日一次的血栓預防，使用81毫克阿司匹林或10毫克口服利伐沙班。然後，所有患者在膝關節置換術後每天使用81毫克阿司匹林進一步預防血栓形成，持續9天，並在髖關節置換術後持續30天。對症狀性靜脈血栓栓塞患者進行90天的追蹤，包括近端深靜脈血栓形成或肺栓塞（主要有效性結果） ，以及出血併發症（主要安全性結果）。與利伐沙班-阿司匹林相比，單獨使用阿司匹林的非劣效邊際為0.7個百分點。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 5429 patients underwent randomization. Venous thromboembolism developed in 13 of 2718 patients (0.48%) in the aspirin-alone group and in 12 of 2647 patients (0.45%) in the rivaroxaban-aspirin group (risk difference, 0.02 percentage points; 95% confidence interval [CI], -0.34 to 0.39; P<0.001 for noninferiority). Major bleeding or clinically relevant nonmajor bleeding events occurred in 45 of 2718 patients (1.66%) in the aspirin-alone group and in 54 of 2647 patients (2.04%) in the rivaroxaban-aspirin group (risk difference, -0.38%; 95% CI, -1.11 to 0.34).
abstract.textZh: 共有5429名患者接受了隨機分組。阿司匹林單獨組的2718名患者中有13名（ 0.48% ）發生靜脈血栓栓塞，利伐沙班-阿司匹林組的2647名患者中有12名（ 0.45% ）發生靜脈血栓栓塞（風險差異， 0.02個百分點； 95%可信區間[CI] ， -0.34至0.39 ；非劣效性P < 0.001 ）。單獨使用阿司匹林組的2718名患者中有45名（ 1.66% ）發生了嚴重出血或臨牀相關的非嚴重出血事件，而利伐沙班-阿司匹林組的2647名患者中有54名（ 2.04% ）發生了嚴重出血或臨牀相關的非嚴重出血事件（風險差異為-0.38% ； 95% CI為-1.11至0.34 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: After total hip and total knee arthroplasty, the use of aspirin alone was not inferior to a strategy of using rivaroxaban followed by aspirin for the prevention of symptomatic venous thromboembolism, with no clinically relevant difference in bleeding events. (Funded by the Canadian Institutes of Health Research; EPCAT III ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04075240.).
abstract.textZh: 全髖和全膝關節置換術後，單獨使用阿司匹林並不劣於使用利伐沙班隨後使用阿司匹林預防症狀性靜脈血栓栓塞的策略，出血事件沒有臨牀相關差異。（由加拿大衛生研究院資助； EPCAT III ClinicalTrials.gov編號： NCT04075240 ）。

articles.titleZh: 利伐沙班然後阿司匹林與全臀或膝關節置換術後單獨服用阿司匹林

articles.title: Clinicopathologic Evaluation of Amyloid Clearance in Alzheimer Disease
articles.authors: Brown CA, Robinson JL, Das SR, McGrew E, Suh E, Van Deerlin VM, Irwin DJ, Nasrallah IM, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: The long-term efficacy of amyloid-targeting therapies hinges on their ability to slow downstream neuropathologic change, but little is known about the influence of amyloid clearance on tau pathology and neurodegeneration.
abstract.textZh: 澱粉樣蛋白靶向療法的長期療效取決於其減緩下遊神經病理變化的能力，但對澱粉樣蛋白清除對tau病理學和神經變性的影響知之甚少。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To determine the postmortem and in vivo association between amyloid levels and downstream neuropathology after treatment with aducanumab in a patient with patchy areas showing minimal residual amyloid levels.
abstract.textZh: 在斑片區域顯示最小殘留澱粉樣蛋白水平的患者中使用aducanumab治療後，確定澱粉樣蛋白水平與下遊神經病理學之間的死後和體內關聯。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: This clinicopathologic case report from a single academic memory center includes a male carrier of the p.R47H TREM2 variant, which is associated with a higher risk of Alzheimer disease, who was in his 50s, had mild cognitive impairment, and received aducanumab while participating in a randomized clinical trial. Fourteen untreated controls, who were matched by age or presence of the TREM2 variant, also are included.
abstract.textZh: 這份來自單一學術記憶中心的臨牀病理病例報告包括一名p.R47H TREM2變異體的男性攜帶者，該變異體與50多歲的阿爾茨海默病風險較高，有輕度認知障礙，並在參與隨機臨牀試驗期間接受了aducanumab。還包括十四個未治療的對照，這些對照依據年齡或TREM2變異體的存在進行匹配。

abstract.label: EXPOSURES
abstract.text: The male carrier of the p.R47H TREM2 variant had received 30 doses of aducanumab (cumulative dose of 280 mg/kg) over 4.5 years.
abstract.textZh: P.R47H TREM2變異體的雄性攜帶者在4.5年內接受了30劑aducanumab （累積劑量為280 mg/kg ）。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: Neuropathologic evaluation at autopsy, positron emission tomography to measure standardized uptake value ratio as a measure of amyloid and tau levels, and magnetic resonance imaging to determine longitudinal change in cortical thickness.
abstract.textZh: 屍體解剖時的神經病理學評估，用於測量標準化攝取值比率以測量澱粉樣蛋白和tau水平的正電子發射斷層掃描，以及用於確定皮質厚度縱向變化的磁共振成像。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Four years after receiving the final dose of aducanumab, the patient died. An autopsy showed variable levels of amyloid pathology, including brain regions with very low levels of amyloid juxtaposed with brain regions that had typically high levels of amyloid in the deep cortical layers and only low levels of amyloid in the superficial cortical layers. Compared with the brain regions of the untreated controls, the brain regions of the patient after treatment with aducanumab showed low levels of amyloid that were preferentially found in the gyral crests, were associated with less tau pathology at autopsy, and were associated with slower longitudinal atrophy on in vivo magnetic resonance imaging (β = -0.50 [95% CI, -0.62 to -0.37]; t = -7.96 and P < .001). In contrast, the patient's brain regions with high amyloid burden were preferentially found in the sulcal depths and had similar levels of tau pathology as seen at autopsy in the untreated controls.
abstract.textZh: 在接受aducanumab的最終劑量後四年，患者死亡。屍體解剖顯示不同程度的澱粉樣蛋白病理學，包括澱粉樣蛋白水平非常低的大腦區域，與深層皮質層中通常含有高水平澱粉樣蛋白的大腦區域並列，而淺層皮質層中只有低水平的澱粉樣蛋白。與未治療對照組的大腦區域相比，使用aducanumab治療後的患者大腦區域顯示低水平的澱粉樣蛋白，優先在迴狀脊髓中發現，在屍體解剖時與較少的tau病理相關，並且在體內磁共振成像時與較慢的縱向萎縮相關（ β = -0.50 [95 ％ CI ， -0.62至-0.37] ； t = -7.96和P < 0.001 ）。相比之下，患者大腦中具有高澱粉樣負荷的區域優先在溝深處發現，並且具有與未治療對照中屍體解剖時相似的tau病理水平。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: In this case report, areas of extensive amyloid clearance after amyloid-targeting therapy were associated with less downstream neuropathologic change. In addition, amyloid clearance appears to preferentially occur in the gyral crests. Future studies should evaluate the differential mechanisms involved in amyloid clearance from superficial and deep cortical layers and in gyri and sulci because extensive amyloid clearance may be necessary to achieve downstream neuropathologic benefit after removal of amyloid.
abstract.textZh: 在本病例報告中，澱粉樣蛋白靶向治療後廣泛的澱粉樣蛋白清除區域與較少的下遊神經病理變化相關。此外，澱粉樣蛋白清除率似乎優先發生在回旋紋中。未來的研究應評估從淺層和深層皮質層以及迴和溝中清除澱粉樣蛋白所涉及的差異機制，因為在去除澱粉樣蛋白後，廣泛的澱粉樣蛋白清除可能是實現下遊神經病理學益處所必需的。

articles.titleZh: 阿茲海默症中澱粉樣蛋白清除率的臨牀病理學評估

articles.title: YEARS Algorithm for Diagnosis of Suspected Pulmonary Embolism in Patients With Cancer: A Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Akerboom B, Martens ESL, Stals MAM, Brouwer RE, Coppens M, Costantino G, Couturaud F, van Dooren YPA, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Although the YEARS algorithm is a safe and efficient way to rule out acute pulmonary embolism (PE), robust evidence on its accuracy in patients with cancer is lacking, and current guidelines suggest proceeding directly to computed tomographic pulmonary angiography (CTPA).
abstract.textZh: 雖然YEARS演算法是排除急性肺栓塞（ PE ）的安全有效方法，但缺乏有關其在癌症患者中準確性的有力證據，目前的指南建議直接進行電腦斷層肺血管造影（ CTPA ）。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To compare the safety and efficiency of the YEARS algorithm with CTPA only to rule out acute PE in patients with active cancer.
abstract.textZh: 將YEARS算法的安全性和效率與CTPA進行比較，僅排除活動性癌症患者的急性PE。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: The Hydra study was an open-label, randomized, investigator-initiated, noninferiority trial with blinded central outcome adjudication conducted from August 22, 2019, to August 21, 2025, the date of final follow-up. Patients with active cancer and suspected acute PE were recruited from emergency departments or medical units in 21 hospitals in the Netherlands, Italy, Switzerland, Belgium, France, and Spain.
abstract.textZh: HYDRA研究是一項開放標籤、隨機、研究者發起的非劣效性試驗，從2019年8月22日至2025年8月21日（最終追蹤日期）進行盲法中央結果裁定。從荷蘭、義大利、瑞士、比利時、法國和西班牙的21家醫院的急診科或醫療單位招募患有活躍癌症和疑似急性PE的患者。

abstract.label: INTERVENTIONS
abstract.text: Patients were randomly assigned in a 1:1 ratio to receive diagnostic management by the YEARS algorithm (n = 352)-consisting of assessing YEARS items, D-dimer levels, and performing risk-dependent CTPA-or by CTPA only (n = 346).
abstract.textZh: 患者以1: 1的比例隨機分配接受YEARS演算法（ n = 352 ）的診斷管理，包括評估YEARS項目、D-二聚體水平和進行風險依賴性CTPA ，或僅接受CTPA （ n = 346 ）。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary outcome was centrally adjudicated symptomatic venous thromboembolism or (possible) PE-related death within 90 days after ruling out PE at baseline, assessed in a per-protocol noninferiority analysis with a 2.6% margin for the upper bound of a 1-sided 99.9% CI. The key secondary outcome was the proportion of negative CTPA results at baseline, assessed in a superiority analysis.
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是基線時排除PE後90天內中央判定的症狀性靜脈血栓栓塞或（可能） PE相關死亡，在符合方案的非劣效性分析中評估，單側99.9% CI的上限為2.6%。關鍵次要結果是基線時CTPA結果陰性的比例，在優效性分析中進行評估。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 698 patients were randomized (median age, 65 years [IQR, 56-72 years], 422 female [60%]), and 104 patients (15%) had PE diagnosed at baseline. One patient was lost to follow-up. Of those in whom PE was considered excluded, 5 of 282 patients (1.8%) in the per-protocol YEARS group vs 15 of 273 patients (5.5%) in the per-protocol CTPA-only group had a primary outcome (absolute risk difference, -3.7%; 99.9% CI, -8.8% to 1.4%; P = 3.4 × 10-5 for noninferiority). In the intention-to-diagnosis analysis, the absolute risk difference between the YEARS algorithm and CTPA only was -2.6% (99.9% CI, -7.5% to 2.4%; P = 5.9 × 10-4 for noninferiority). Diagnostic management of PE was carried out for 77 of 352 patients (22%) in the YEARS group without CTPA. No difference in the proportion of negative CTPA (P = .93) was observed between the groups.
abstract.textZh: 總共698名患者被隨機分組（中位年齡， 65歲[IQR ， 56-72歲] ， 422名女性[60%] ） ， 104名患者（ 15% ）在基線時診斷出PE。1名患者失去追蹤。在被認為排除PE的患者中，按研究方案年份組的282名患者中有5名（ 1.8 ％ ）與按研究方案單純CTPA組的273名患者中有15名（ 5.5 ％ ）有主要結局（絕對風險差異為-3.7 ％ ； 99.9 ％ CI為-8.8 ％至1.4 ％ ；非劣效性為P = 3.4 × 10-5 ）。在意向-診斷分析中， YEARS演算法與CTPA之間的絕對風險差異僅為-2.6% （ 99.9% CI ， -7.5%至2.4% ；非劣效性為P = 5.9 × 10-4 ）。在沒有CTPA的YEARS組中，對352名患者中的77名（ 22 ％ ）進行了PE的診斷管理。未觀察到組間CTPA陰性比例的差異(P = 0.93)。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: In patients with cancer and suspected PE, a diagnostic strategy using the YEARS diagnostic algorithm was as safe as using CTPA only, thus, obviating the need to perform CTPA in 22% of patients.
abstract.textZh: 在患有癌症和疑似PE的患者中，使用YEARS診斷算法的診斷策略與僅使用CTPA一樣安全，因此22 ％的患者不需要進行CTPA。

abstract.label: TRIAL REGISTRATION
abstract.text: ccmo.nl Identifier: NL-OMON52383.
abstract.textZh: ccmo.nl識別碼： NL-OMON52383。

articles.title: Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations
articles.authors: Dalglish SL, Sakyi KS, Prost A, Amin S, Sardesi A, Mudaly A, Bhan G, Devakumar D, et al.

abstract.text: Currently children's needs, perspectives, and rights are not adequately included in public policies, with negative consequences for the health and wellbeing of children and future generations. The 2020 WHO-UNICEF-Lancet Commission reviewed threats to children's health and concluded that children's needs and voices should be centred in all policies for a sustainable future. Since 2021, Children in All Policies 2030, a global collaboration of policy makers, scientists, and advocates, has implemented the Commission's recommendations by fostering new approaches to participatory, intersectoral policy making across diverse countries. Efforts to implement the Commission's recommendations encountered challenges including flawed assumptions in prevailing policy-making models, failure to fulfil children's right to participate, and an ongoing scarcity of intersectoral policy integration. Eight lessons on what works for improving policy making and implementation emerged: use creative means to involve children, patiently assemble coalitions, prepare to seize political opportunities, harmonise global data to bridge UN partnerships, create national political and technical platforms, use media to change cultural perceptions, use strategic framing to overcome sectoral barriers, and embrace joint learning. Harnessing people's consideration and concern for children and future generations and engaging children's voices represents a powerful political opportunity to reach current development goals and ensure a healthier, more sustainable future.
abstract.textZh: 目前，兒童的需求、觀點和權利沒有充分納入公共政策，對兒童和後代的健康和福祉產生了負面影響。 2020年世衛組織-聯合國兒童基金會-柳葉刀委員會（ WHO-UNICEF-Lancet Commission ）審查了兒童健康面臨的威脅，並得出結論，兒童的需求和聲音應以所有可持續未來政策為中心。 自2021年以來，由決策者、科學家和倡導者組成的全球合作組織Children in All Policies 2030透過在不同國家推動參與式跨部門政策制定的新方法，實施了委員會的建議。 執行委員會建議的努力遇到了挑戰，包括現行政策制定模式中的錯誤假設，未能實現兒童的參與權，以及部門間政策整合的持續稀缺。 關於改善政策制定和實施的八個教訓出現了：使用創造性的手段讓兒童參與，耐心地組建聯盟，準備抓住政治機會，協調全球數據以彌合聯合國的夥伴關係，創建國家政治和技術平臺，使用媒體來改變文化觀念，使用戰略框架來克服部門障礙，以及接受共同學習。 利用人們對兒童和後代的關懷和關懷，並吸引兒童的聲音，是實現當前發展的強大政治機會

articles.titleZh: 所有政策中的兒童：從全球合作中吸取教訓，以促進兒童和子孫後代的健康和福祉

articles.title: Non-invasive removal of the Smart tracheal occlusion device for fetal congenital diaphragmatic hernia: a single-arm, open-label, phase 1 study
articles.authors: Russo FM, Sananès N, Letourneau A, Devlieger R, Mégier C, Lewi L, Huyn VTN, Aertsen M, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: One of the drawbacks of fetoscopic endoluminal tracheal occlusion (FETO) for congenital diaphragmatic hernia (CDH) is the need for a second intervention to establish airway patency. In this first-in-human study, we aimed to evaluate a novel tracheal occlusion device (Smart-TO) that spontaneously deflates when in close proximity to a strong magnetic field.
abstract.textZh: 先天性膈疝（ CDH ）的胎兒鏡下腔內氣管閉塞（ FETO ）的缺點之一是需要第二次幹預以確立氣道通暢性。在這項首次人體研究中，我們旨在評估一種新型氣管閉塞裝置（ Smart-TO ） ，該裝置在靠近強磁場時會自發放氣。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted two parallel single-centre, single-arm, open-label trials in Paris, France, and Leuven, Belgium. Eligibility criteria included patient age 18 years or more, singleton pregnancy with CDH, and severe or moderate pulmonary hypoplasia in left-sided CDH; in Leuven, eligibility criteria also included severe hypoplasia in right-sided and bilateral CDH. Fetal lung size was assessed by measuring the observed-to-expected lung-to-head ratio by ultrasonography. Data for baseline demographics were self-reported and collected at the screening visit. Insertion of the Smart-TO balloon was scheduled between 27+0 weeks and 31+6 weeks of gestation. Balloon deflation was scheduled between 34+0 weeks and 34+6 weeks (or earlier, if clinically indicated) by exposure to the magnetic field of a MRI machine, and ultrasonography was then done to confirm balloon deflation. The primary endpoint was balloon deflation, with expulsion of the balloon from the fetal airways at birth as a coprimary outcome in the Paris arm of the study. The primary outcome was reported with its 95% CI using the continuity-corrected score method for all patients with the investigational medical device in place at the time of deflation. Safety analysis was conducted for all patients in whom FETO was attempted. These trials are registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04931212 [Paris]) and NCT05100693 [Leuven]) and have been completed.
abstract.textZh: 我們在法國巴黎和比利時魯汶進行了兩項平行的單中心、單臂、開放標籤試驗。 合格標準包括年齡在18歲或以上的患者、CDH單胎妊娠，以及左側CDH的嚴重或中度肺發育不良；在魯汶，合格標準還包括右側和雙側CDH的嚴重發育不良。 通過超聲波測量觀察到與預期肺部與頭部的比率來評估胎兒肺部大小。 在篩選回診時自我報告並收集基線人口統計資料。 Smart-TO氣球的插入安排在妊娠27 +0週至31 +6週之間。 通過暴露在MRI機器的磁場中，計劃在34 +0週和34 +6週之間（或更早，如果臨牀指徵）進行球囊放氣，然後進行超聲波檢查以確認球囊放氣。 主要終點是氣球放氣，巴黎研究組在出生時將氣球從胎兒氣道排出作為共主要結果。 使用連續性校正評分法對所有在放氣時使用研究醫療器械的患者報告主要結果，其95%信賴區間。 對所有試圖使用FETO的患者進行安全性分析。 這些試驗已在ClinicalTrials.gov （ NCT04931212 [Paris] ）和NCT05100693 [Leuven] ）註冊並已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between Aug 4, 2021 and Jan 15, 2024, 48 patients were enrolled. Of these, 47 patients underwent FETO, and the Smart-TO was successfully placed in 46 fetuses. Median gestational age at FETO was 29+2 weeks (28+5-30+1 weeks). After placement, there was one spontaneous balloon deflation and one unexplained intrauterine fetal death. In all other patients, MRI machine-induced balloon deflation was attempted. The deflation rate was 100% (95% CI 92-100). At birth, the empty balloon was outside the airways in all infants. There were two cases of tracheomalacia in survivors, both with symptom resolution by the time of discharge from neonatal intensive care. There were 14 neonatal deaths, all attributed to pulmonary hypoplasia. Five adverse events were considered likely related to the device (of a total of 84), and no serious adverse events (of a total of 40) were related to the Smart-TO device.
abstract.textZh: 在2021年8月4日至2024年1月15日期間，共招募了48名患者。其中， 47名患者接受了FETO ， Smart-TO成功地放置在46名胎兒中。胎齡中位數為29 +2週(28 +5-30 +1週)。放置後，有一次自發性氣球洩氣和一次不明原因的子宮內胎兒死亡。在所有其他患者中，均嘗試進行MRI機器誘導的球囊放氣。放氣率為100% （ 95% CI 92-100 ）。出生時，所有嬰兒的空氣球都在氣道外。倖存者中有兩例氣管軟化症，均在新生兒重症監護出院時症狀消失。有14例新生兒死亡，全部歸因於肺發育不良。5例不良事件被認為可能與裝置有關（共84例） ，無嚴重不良事件（共40例）與Smart-TO裝置有關。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: This study shows effective magnetic resonance-induced deflation of the Smart-TO balloon and supports short-term safety. These findings constitute an important advance in fetal surgery for CDH, eliminating the need for a second intrauterine procedure.
abstract.textZh: 本研究顯示了Smart-TO氣球的有效磁共振導致的放氣，並支持短期安全性。這些發現是CDH胎兒手術的重要進展，無需進行第二次子宮內手術。

abstract.label: FUNDING
abstract.text: Clinical Council for Research and Education (Klinische Onderzoeks-en Opleidingsraad) of the University Hospitals of Leuven and Assistance Publique-Hôpitaux de Paris. Investigational devices (Smart-TO) were provided free of charge to patients and institutions by BS-MTI.
abstract.textZh: 魯汶大學醫院和巴黎援助公共醫院的臨牀研究和教育委員會（ Klinische Onderzoeks-en Opleidingsraad ）。研究器械（ Smart-TO ）由BS-MTI免費提供給患者和機構。

articles.titleZh: 非侵入性移除胎兒先天性膈疝的智慧氣管閉塞裝置：一項單臂、開放標籤、1期研究

articles.title: Cervical cancer mortality trends following HPV vaccination in England, 2001-24: an analysis of population-based mortality data
articles.authors: Sasieni P, Falcaro M

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccination is a key component of global cervical cancer elimination strategies. While substantial declines in cervical cancer incidence have been observed in several countries, evidence of its effect on mortality is scarce. England introduced a national HPV vaccination programme in 2008 for girls aged 12-13 years (achieving 80-90% coverage before the COVID-19 pandemic), with a catch-up campaign in 2008-10 for girls aged 14-18 years. We aimed to investigate trends in cervical cancer mortality and to estimate the reduction in cervical cancer deaths in young women in England following the introduction of HPV vaccination.
abstract.textZh: 人類乳頭瘤病毒（ HPV ）疫苗接種是全球消除子宮頸癌策略的關鍵組成部分。雖然在幾個國家觀察到子宮頸癌發病率大幅下降，但其對死亡率影響的證據很少。英國於2008年推出了針對12-13歲女孩的國家HPV疫苗接種計劃（在COVID-19大流行之前達到80-90 ％的覆蓋率） ，並於2008-10年針對14-18歲的女孩進行了追趕活動。我們旨在調查子宮頸癌死亡率的趨勢，並估計在引入HPV疫苗接種後，英國年輕女性子宮頸癌死亡率的減少。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We analysed population-based cervical cancer mortality data from England between 2001 and 2024 among women aged 20-24, 25-29, and 30-34 years. HPV vaccination coverage by birth cohort was obtained from official reports and used to estimate, for each age group and calendar year of death, the proportion of women who had been vaccinated. We plotted observed and adjusted age-specific mortality rates against year of death and overlaid a smoothed curve. Poisson regression applied to the numbers of deaths was used to estimate the relative risk reduction in vaccinated women compared with what was expected in the absence of vaccination, assuming no herd immunity. Confidence intervals were obtained by inverting the likelihood ratio test.
abstract.textZh: 我們分析了2001年至2024年間英國20-24歲、25-29歲和30-34歲婦女的基於人羣的子宮頸癌死亡率數據。按出生隊列劃分的HPV疫苗接種覆蓋率來自官方報告，並用於估計每個年齡組和死亡日曆年的已接種疫苗的婦女比例。我們繪製了觀察和調整的年齡特異性死亡率與死亡年份，並疊加了平滑曲線。假設沒有羣體免疫力，使用對死亡人數應用的泊鬆回歸來估計接種疫苗的婦女相對於未接種疫苗的預期風險降低。通過反轉似然比檢驗獲得置信區間。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: In women aged 20-24 years between 2020 and 2024, in whom vaccination coverage was around 88-90% at age 12-13 years, no deaths occurred, compared with 23·1 expected deaths based on historical rates, corresponding to a mortality reduction of 100% (95% CI 84-100). In earlier birth cohorts, who were offered vaccination up to age 18 years with coverage of around 63-87%, mortality reductions of 80% (51-94) in women aged 20-24 years in 2015-19, and 69% (55-79) in women aged 25-29 years in 2020-24 were observed. The relative risk reduction in vaccinated women was estimated from population-level data to be 100% (95% CI 81 to 100) in women aged 20-24 years, 100% (89 to 100) in those aged 25-29 years, and 63% (-13 to 100) in those aged 30-34 years. Up until the end of 2024, HPV vaccination in England was associated with a reduction of around 199·6 cervical cancer deaths (95% CI 125·0-274·2).
abstract.textZh: 在2020年至2024年之間的20-24歲婦女中， 12-13歲的疫苗接種覆蓋率約為88-90% ，沒有發生死亡，而根據歷史比率預計的死亡人數為23.1人，相應於死亡率降低100% （ 95% CI 84-100 ）。在較早的分娩隊列中， WHO接受了18歲以下的疫苗接種，覆蓋率約為63-87 ％ ， 2015-19年20-24歲婦女的死亡率降低了80 ％ （ 51-94 ） ， 2020-24年25-29歲婦女的死亡率降低了69 ％ （ 55-79 ）。根據人口數據估計，接種疫苗的婦女的相對風險降低在20-24歲的婦女中為100 ％ （ 95 ％ CI 81至100 ） ，在25-29歲的婦女中為100 ％ （ 89至100 ） ，在30-34歲的婦女中為63 ％ （ -13至100 ）。直到2024年底，英格蘭的HPV疫苗接種與約199 · 6宮頸癌死亡人數的減少有關（ 95 ％ CI 125 · 0-274 · 2 ）。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Our findings provide the first robust national-level evidence, albeit observational, that high HPV vaccination coverage is associated with a substantial reduction in cervical cancer deaths. This is shown by the substantial decrease in cervical cancer deaths observed among women aged 20-29 years in England, particularly among those vaccinated at ages 12-13 years. These findings support the achievability of the WHO goal of eliminating cervical cancer as a public health problem, and efforts should be made to achieve high vaccine uptake among young adolescents globally.
abstract.textZh: 我們的發現提供了第一個強有力的國家級證據，儘管是觀察性的，即高HPV疫苗接種覆蓋率與子宮頸癌死亡人數的大幅減少有關。英國20-29歲婦女的子宮頸癌死亡率大幅下降，特別是12-13歲接種疫苗的婦女，就證明了這一點。這些發現支持世界衛生組織消除子宮頸癌作為公共衛生問題的目標的可實現性，並應努力在全球青少年中實現高疫苗接種率。

abstract.label: FUNDING
abstract.text: Cancer Research UK.
abstract.textZh: Cancer Research UK.

articles.titleZh: 2001-24年英格蘭HPV疫苗接種後的子宮頸癌死亡率趨勢：基於人羣的死亡率數據分析

articles.title: Benzylpenicillin versus flucloxacillin or cloxacillin for the treatment of penicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus bacteraemia (SNAP): an international, multicentre, open-label, non-inferiority randomised controlled trial
articles.authors: Staphylococcus aureus Network Adaptive Platform (SNAP) Trial Group

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Previously considered rare, penicillin-susceptible Staphylococcus aureus (PSSA) bacteraemia has re-emerged worldwide. Although benzylpenicillin might offer advantages in terms of pharmacokinetic and adverse effect profiles, anti-staphylococcal penicillins are recommended for serious infections because of concern over undetected penicillin resistance. We aimed to compare benzylpenicillin with anti-staphylococcal penicillins (cloxacillin or flucloxacillin) for the treatment of PSSA bacteraemia in adults.
abstract.textZh: 以前被認為是罕見的盤尼西林敏感金黃色葡萄球菌（ PSSA ）細菌血症在世界各地重新出現。雖然苄青黴素在藥物動力學和副作用方面可能具有優勢，但由於擔心未檢測到的青黴素耐藥性，抗葡萄球菌青黴素被推薦用於嚴重感染。我們的目標是將苄青黴素與抗葡萄球菌青黴素（氯唑西林或氟氯唑西林）進行比較，以治療成人PSSA細菌血症。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This investigator-initiated, international, multicentre, open-label, non-inferiority, randomised controlled trial was conducted within the PSSA silo of the backbone domain of the ongoing S aureus Network Adaptive Platform (SNAP) trial. We enrolled patients of all ages who were admitted with S aureus bacteraemia at 67 hospitals across Australia, New Zealand, Canada, Israel, the Netherlands, the UK, Singapore, and South Africa. Herein, we report results for adult patients (aged ≥18 years). Participants were randomly allocated 1:1 to receive either benzylpenicillin, or flucloxacillin or cloxacillin. Trial staff, staff caring for participants, and participants were aware of the treatment allocated and received. Cloxacillin was used only where flucloxacillin was not available (ie, Canada, Israel, Singapore, and South Africa). Recommended standard dosing for benzylpenicillin was 1·8 g intravenously once every 4 h or 2·4 g once every 6 h; for flucloxacillin 2·0 g intravenously once every 6 h; and for cloxacillin 2·0 g intravenously once every 4 h. The primary outcome was all-cause mortality 90 days after platform entry, assessed in the intention-to-treat population, including all patients with available data. The primary outcome was analysed by use of a hierarchical Bayesian logistic regression model, with non-inferiority of benzylpenicillin defined as an adjusted odds ratio (OR) of less than 1·20. Analyses occurred after every 500 participants reached 90-day follow-up. The SNAP trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05137119) and is ongoing.
abstract.textZh: 這項由研究者發起的國際性、多中心、開放標籤、非劣效性、隨機對照試驗是在正在進行的金黃色葡萄球菌網絡自適應平臺(SNAP)試驗的骨幹領域的PSSA筒倉中進行的。 我們在澳大利亞、紐西蘭、加拿大、以色列、荷蘭、英國、新加坡和南非的67家醫院招募了所有年齡段的金黃色葡萄球菌細菌血症患者。 在此，我們報告成人患者（年齡≥ 18歲）的結果。 參與者被隨機分配1 ： 1接受苄青黴素，或氟氯西林或氯西林。 試驗工作人員、照顧參與者的工作人員和參與者都知道分配和接受的治療。 只有在氟氯西林不可用的地方（即加拿大、以色列、新加坡和南非）才使用氯唑西林。 苄青黴素的推薦標準劑量為每4小時靜脈注射1. 8 g或每6小時靜脈注射2. 4 g ；氟氯西林2. 0 g靜脈注射每6小時一次；氯沙西林2. 0 g靜脈注射每4小時一次。 主要結果是進入平臺90天後的全因死亡率，在意向治療族羣中進行評估，包括所有可用數據的患者。 主要結果使用分層貝葉斯邏輯回歸模型進行分析，苄青黴素的非劣效性定義為調整比值比(OR)小於1 · 20。 每500名參與者達到90天隨訪後進行分析。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Following the fourth interim analysis, the data and safety monitoring committee recommended ceasing recruitment before prespecified stopping thresholds were reached because of increased acute kidney injury (AKI) in participants receiving flucloxacillin or cloxacillin, and the PSSA silo was closed for recruitment on Aug 7, 2024. Between Feb 18, 2022, and June 21, 2024, of 493 adults with PSSA bacteraemia, 125 were randomly assigned to the flucloxacillin or cloxacillin group and 156 to the benzylpenicillin group. The median age was 67 years (IQR 56-77), 87 (31%) were female, and 194 (69%) were male. 21 (14%) of 152 in the benzylpenicillin group and 26 (22%) of 121 in the flucloxacillin or cloxacillin group met the primary outcome of death at 90 days (adjusted OR 0·67, 95% credible interval [CrI] 0·35-1·28), with a posterior probability of benzylpenicillin non-inferiority of 96·1% and of benzylpenicillin superiority of 88·9%. AKI occurred in 17 (11%) of 153 patients in the benzylpenicillin group and 27 (22%) of 124 patients in the flucloxacillin or cloxacillin group (adjusted OR 0·50, 95% CrI 0·26-0·94), corresponding to a posterior probability of non-inferiority of benzylpenicillin of 99·8% and superiority of benzylpenicillin of 98·4%. Seven total serious adverse reactions were reported from six (4%) of 156 participants in the benzylpenicillin group and ten were reported from nine (7%) of 125 participants in the flucloxacillin or cloxacillin group.
abstract.textZh: 在第四次期中分析後，數據和安全監測委員會建議，由於接受氟氯西林或氯沙西林的參與者急性腎損傷（ AKI ）增加，在達到預先指定的停止閾值之前停止招募，並於2024年8月7日關閉PSSA藥倉進行招募。 在2022年2月18日至2024年6月21日期間， 493名患有PSSA細菌血症的成年人中， 125名被隨機分配到氟氯西林或氯沙西林組， 156名分配到苄青黴素組。 中位年齡為67歲（ IQR 56-77 ） ， 87 （ 31 ％ ）為女性， 194 （ 69 ％ ）為男性。苄青黴素組中152人中有21人（ 14 ％ ） ，氟氯西林或氯氧西林組中121人中有26人（ 22 ％ ）在90天時達到主要死亡結果（調整後OR 0.67 ， 95 ％可信區間[CrI] 0.35-1.28 ） ，苄青黴素非劣效性後置概率為96.1 ％ ，苄青黴素優效性後置概率為88.9 ％。 苄青黴素組153名患者中有17名(11%)發生AKI ，氟氯西林或氯氧西林組124名患者中有27名(22%)發生AKI (調整後的OR 0. 50、95% CrI 0. 26-0. 94) ，對應於苄青黴素非劣效性的後位概率為99. 8% ，苄青黴素優效性為98. 4%。 苄青黴素組156名參與者中有6名（ 4% ）報告了7例嚴重不良反應，氟氯西林或氯西林組125名參與者中有9名（ 7% ）報告了10例嚴重不良反應。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Although the prespecified non-inferiority criterion for benzylpenicillin was not met, the probability of benzylpenicillin being non-inferior for mortality, along with a reduction in risk of AKI, indicates that benzylpenicillin should be preferred over flucloxacillin or cloxacillin for treatment of PSSA bacteraemia in adults.
abstract.textZh: 雖然不符合苄青黴素的預定非劣效性標準，但苄青黴素的死亡率非劣效性以及AKI風險的降低表明，苄青黴素應優於氟氯西林或氯沙西林用於治療成人PSSA細菌血症。

abstract.label: FUNDING
abstract.text: National Health and Medical Research Council, Medical Research Future Fund, Canadian Institutes of Health Research, Accelerating Clinical Trials Consortium, UMC Utrecht, ZonMW Good Use of Medicines programme, Health Research Council of New Zealand, Starship Foundation, National Healthcare Group Fund, National Medical Research Council, National Institute for Health and Care Research, Medical Research Council, and Paterson Family Foundation.
abstract.textZh: National Health and Medical Research Council、Medical Research Future Fund、Canadian Institutes of Health Research、Accelerating Clinical Trials Consortium、UMC Utrecht、ZonMW Good Use of Medicines program、Health Research Council of New Zealand、Starship Foundation、National Healthcare Group Fund、National Medical Research Council、National Institute for Health and Care Research、Medical Research Council和Paterson Family Foundation。

articles.titleZh: 苄青黴素對比氟氯西林或氯沙西林治療盤尼西林敏感性金黃色葡萄球菌細菌血症(SNAP) ：一項國際、多中心、開放標籤、非劣效性隨機對照試驗

articles.title: Orforglipron compared with dapagliflozin in adults with type 2 diabetes and inadequate glycaemic control with metformin (ACHIEVE-2): a multicentre, randomised, non-inferiority, open-label, phase 3 trial
articles.authors: Welch M, Forst T, Jia W, Del Pino PO, Denning M, Wu WS, Li J, Liu R, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Type 2 diabetes is a complex metabolic disorder often requiring combination therapy for optimal glycaemic control. This study assessed the efficacy and safety of orforglipron, an oral, non-peptide GLP-1 receptor agonist, versus dapagliflozin, an oral SGLT2 inhibitor, in participants with type 2 diabetes and inadequate glycaemic control with metformin.
abstract.textZh: 2型糖尿病是一種複雜的代謝障礙，通常需要聯合治療以獲得最佳的血糖控制。本研究評估了口服非肽類GLP-1受體激動劑orforglipron與口服SGLT2抑製劑dapagliflozin在2型糖尿病和二甲雙胍血糖控制不足的參與者中的有效性和安全性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This 40-week, phase 3, multicentre, open-label (orforglipron dose-blinded), randomised study was conducted in 73 sites across six countries. The study included adults with type 2 diabetes using metformin (≥1500 mg/day) with glycated haemoglobin (HbA1c) concentrations between 7·0% and 10·5% (53-91 mmol/mol), stable bodyweight (±5%), and a BMI of 23·0 kg/m2 or more. Participants were randomly assigned in a 1:1:1:1 ratio to receive once-daily oral orforglipron (3 mg, 12 mg, or 36 mg) or dapagliflozin 10 mg. The primary endpoint was change from baseline in HbA1c at week 40, using a non-inferiority margin of 0·3% for orforglipron versus dapagliflozin; analysis was based on the treatment-regimen estimand (data obtained regardless of study intervention discontinuation or initiation of additional glucose-lowering agents). The treatment regimen estimand was the primary estimand, with the efficacy estimand considered supportive. Safety was assessed in all randomised participants who received at least one dose of study drug. This trial is registered at ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06192108, completed).
abstract.textZh: 這項為期40週、3期、多中心、開放標籤（ orforglipron劑量盲法）的隨機研究在6個國家的73個研究中心進行。 該研究包括使用二甲雙胍（ ≥ 1500 mg/天）、糖化血紅蛋白（ HbA1c ）濃度介於7.0%至10.5% （ 53-91 mmol/mol ）、穩定體重（ ± 5% ）和BMI為23.0 kg/m2或更高的2型糖尿病成人。 以1: 1: 1: 1的比例隨機分配參與者接受每日一次的口服orforglipron （ 3 mg、12 mg或36 mg ）或dapagliflozin 10 mg。 主要評估指標是第40週時HbA1c相較於基線的變化，使用Orforglipron相對於達格列嗪的非劣效性邊際為0.3 ％ ；分析是基於治療方案估計數據（無論是否停止研究幹預或開始其他降糖劑都會獲得數據）。 治療方案評估和是主要評估，有效性評估和被認為具有支持性。 在接受至少一劑研究藥物的所有隨機分配參與者中評估安全性。 本試驗在ClinicalTrials.gov註冊（ NCT06192108 ，已完成）。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: From Jan 10, 2024, to Sept 26, 2025, 1404 adults were assessed and 962 participants were randomly assigned to orforglipron 3 mg (n=240), 12 mg (n=241), or 36 mg (n=241), or dapagliflozin 10 mg (n=240). The baseline population included 474 (49%) females and had a mean age of 56·1 years (SD 11·5), HbA1c of 8·14% (1·04), type 2 diabetes duration of 8·0 years (6·7), and BMI of 32·6 kg/m2 (6·6). At week 40, for the treatment regimen estimand, all orforglipron doses were non-inferior to dapagliflozin in reducing HbA1c. Change from baseline in mean HbA1c was -1·23% (SE 0·08), -1·50% (0·08), and -1·56% (0·09) with orforglipron 3 mg, 12 mg, and 36 mg, respectively, versus -0·81% (0·07) with dapagliflozin 10 mg; estimated treatment difference versus dapagliflozin was -0·42% (95% CI -0·62 to -0·23), -0·70% (-0·90 to -0·49), and -0·75% (-0·96 to -0·55) with orforglipron 3 mg, 12 mg, and 36 mg, respectively (all p<0·0001). The most frequent adverse events associated with orforglipron were mild-to-moderate gastrointestinal events, observed in 112 (47%) of 240 participants receiving orforglipron 3 mg, 112 (46%) of 241 receiving 12 mg, and 130 (54%) of 241 receiving 36 mg, versus 29 (12%) of 240 receiving dapagliflozin. More study intervention discontinuations were observed with orforglipron 3 mg (35 [15%] of 240), 12 mg (44 [18%] of 241), and 36 mg (47 [20%] of 241) than with dapagliflozin (14 [6%] of 240). No severe episode of hypoglycaemia was reported.

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Orforglipron demonstrated superior glycaemic control compared with dapagliflozin, with a tolerability profile consistent with the GLP-1 receptor agonist class, including increased rates of discontinuation due to adverse events, positioning it as a potential effective oral treatment option for type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 與達格列嗪相比， Orforglipron顯示出優越的血糖控制，其耐受性與GLP-1受體激動劑類別一致，包括由於不良事件導致的停藥率增加，將其定位為2型糖尿病的潛在有效口服治療選擇。

articles.title: A case of acute necrotising encephalitis secondary to human herpesvirus 6 infection
articles.authors: Shinaman G, Lewandowski E, Wozniak G, Guo J, Thompson-Stone R, Owlett L, Ma H

abstract.text: In this Clinical Rounds, we present the case of a girl aged 11 months who developed acute necrotising encephalitis in the setting of human herpesvirus 6 infection, complicated by elevated intracranial pressure, seizures, and development of increased tone. This patient presented with common features of acute necrotising encephalitis including fever, seizures, altered level of consciousness, and focal neurological deficits. We discuss the investigations for acute necrotising encephalitis, which is extensive and includes serology, often showing thrombocytopenia and liver dysfunction. Cerebrospinal fluid studies can show elevated protein without pleocytosis of white blood cells. Imaging can show signal intensity changes on T2-weighted images in the bilateral thalami, basal ganglia, subcortical white matter, cerebellum, and brainstem, in addition to restricted diffusion. In this Clinical Rounds, we also highlight the importance of rapid treatment, which includes immunosuppression with corticosteroids, intravenous immunoglobulin, and plasma exchange. Finally, we discuss the poor outcomes and prognosis for patients diagnosed with acute necrotising encephalitis, with a 27% mortality rate and moderate to severe disability in 63% of survivors.
abstract.textZh: 在這個臨牀回合中，我們介紹了一名11個月大的女孩的病例，她在人類皰疹病毒6型感染的情況下發展為急性壞死性腦炎，伴隨著顱內壓升高、癲癇發作和張力增加。 該患者出現急性壞死性腦炎的共同特徵，包括發燒、癲癇發作、意識水平改變和局竈性神經功能缺陷。 我們討論急性壞死性腦炎的調查，這是廣泛的，包括血清學，通常顯示血小板減少和肝功能障礙。 腦脊液研究可以顯示蛋白質升高，而沒有白細胞的多胞增生。 成像可以顯示雙側丘腦、基底神經節、皮質下白質、小腦和腦幹中T2加權影像的信號強度變化，以及受限的擴散。 在本次臨牀回合中，我們還強調了快速治療的重要性，其中包括使用皮質類固醇、靜脈注射免疫球蛋白和血漿交換的免疫抑制。 最後，我們討論了診斷為急性壞死性腦炎的患者的預後不良，死亡率為27% ， 63%的倖存者為中度至重度殘疾。

articles.titleZh: 一例人類皰疹病毒6型感染引起的急性壞死性腦炎

articles.title: Advancing the relevance of clinical trials for older patients
articles.authors: Wildiers H, Hamaker M, Mooijaart S, Mohile S, Canoui-Poitrine F, Guasti L, de Glas N

abstract.text: Older patients represent the fastest growing patient group in clinical care. They are a heterogeneous group, for whom evidence for making treatment decisions is often scarce. Important domains for advancing the relevance of clinical trials for older patients are selection and inclusion of representative patients, choosing appropriate therapeutic interventions, and studying relevant outcomes. In the last decade, a myriad of publications has recommended multiple solutions that improve the relevance of trials for older people. Although uptake of these recommendations has been slow, there are now some excellent and successful implementation approaches that show that it is possible to design and execute trials that are inclusive of older patients, address relevant outcomes, and allow for real-world comparisons of intervention effectiveness. Observational studies based on different data sources add useful complementary information. This narrative review aims to synthesise best practices and successful strategies to improve the relevance of clinical trials for older patients.
abstract.textZh: 老年患者是臨牀護理中增長最快的患者羣體。 他們是一個異質的羣體，對他們來說，做出治療決定的證據往往很少。 推進老年患者臨牀試驗相關性的重要領域是選擇和納入代表性患者、選擇適當的治療幹預措施以及研究相關結果。 在過去十年中，無數的出版物推薦了多種解決方案，以提高試驗對老年人的相關性。 雖然對這些建議的採用一直很慢，但現在有一些出色且成功的實施方法表明，可以設計和執行包含老年患者的試驗，解決相關結果，並允許實際比較幹預有效性。 基於不同數據來源的觀察性研究增加了有用的補充信息。 本敘述性回顧旨在綜合最佳實踐和成功策略，以提高臨牀試驗對老年患者的相關性。

articles.titleZh: 提升老年患者臨牀試驗的相關性

articles.title: Nutrition Therapy in Critically Ill Adults
articles.authors: Patel JJ, McClave SA

abstract.text: In the acute phase of critical illness, adults have severe catabolism, inflammation, muscle loss, and gut dysfunction, all of which shape nutritional requirements. Early enteral nutrition supports gut integrity and microbiome health, but trials have shown that early short-term parenteral nutrition is a safe alternative when enteral feeding is not possible. Large trials have shown that early full-dose energy delivery offers no benefit over restrictive dosing and may increase gastrointestinal and metabolic complications, findings that support a restrictive nutrition strategy, especially in patients who have circulatory shock or are at risk for refeeding syndrome. Similarly, large trials have shown no advantage of high-dose over standard-dose protein and suggest harm in patients with acute kidney injury. Because adverse events are common with enteral nutrition, safe nutrition delivery requires gradual advancement, strategies for prevention of refeeding syndrome, glycemic control, and avoidance of routine gastric residual volume monitoring. Patient heterogeneity underscores the need for precise, biomarker-guided, phase-specific nutrition to preserve lean muscle mass and improve recovery.
abstract.textZh: 在嚴重疾病的急性期，成人會有嚴重的分解代謝、發炎、肌肉喪失和腸道功能障礙，所有這些都會影響營養需求。 早期腸內營養支持腸道完整性和微生物組健康，但試驗表明，當無法進行腸內餵食時，早期短期腸外營養是一種安全的替代方案。 大型試驗表明，與限制性劑量相比，早期全劑量能量輸送沒有任何好處，並可能增加胃腸道和代謝併發症，這些發現支持限制性營養策略，特別是在患有循環性休克或有再餵食綜合徵風險的患者中。 同樣，大規模試驗顯示高劑量比標準劑量蛋白質沒有優勢，並表明急性腎損傷患者受到傷害。 由於不良事件在腸內營養中很常見，因此安全的營養輸送需要漸進，預防再餵食綜合徵的策略，血糖控制和避免常規胃剩餘體積監測。 患者的異質性強調了對精確、生物標記引導、階段特異性營養的需求，以保持瘦肌肉質量並改善恢復。

articles.titleZh: 重症成人營養治療

articles.title: Ensartinib in Resected ALK-Positive Non-Small-Cell Lung Cancer
articles.authors: Yue D, Huang M, Song P, Chen Y, Li B, Fu J, Guo J, Cheng C, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) inhibitors have emerged as promising agents for patients with resectable ALK-positive non-small-cell lung cancer (NSCLC). Whether ensartinib, a second-generation ALK inhibitor, is safe and effective in such patients is unknown.
abstract.textZh: 間變性淋巴瘤激酶（ ALK ）抑製劑已成為可切除ALK陽性非小細胞肺癌（ NSCLC ）患者的有希望的藥物。目前尚不清楚第二代ALK抑制劑恩沙替尼在這類患者中是否安全有效。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this phase 3, double-blind, randomized trial involving patients with completely resected, ALK-positive stage IB to IIIB NSCLC after adjuvant chemotherapy, we randomly assigned patients in a 1:1 ratio to receive ensartinib at a dose of 225 mg once daily or placebo for 24 months. The primary end point was disease-free survival in patients with stage II to IIIB NSCLC. The key secondary end point was disease-free survival in the overall patient population.
abstract.textZh: 在這項3期雙盲隨機試驗中，涉及輔助化療後完全切除的ALK陽性IB至IIIB期NSCLC患者，我們以1: 1的比例隨機分配患者接受恩薩替尼，劑量為225毫克，每日一次或安慰劑，持續24個月。主要終點是II至IIIB期NSCLC患者的無病生存期。次要關鍵終點是整體患者族羣的無病生存期。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 274 patients were randomly assigned to receive ensartinib or placebo (137 patients in each group). At 24 months, the percentage of patients with stage II to IIIB disease who were alive and disease-free was 86.4% in the ensartinib group and 53.5% in the placebo group (hazard ratio for disease recurrence or death, 0.20; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.11 to 0.38; P<0.001). In the overall patient population, the percentage of patients who were alive and disease-free was 87.3% in the ensartinib group and 57.2% in the placebo group (hazard ratio, 0.20; 95% CI, 0.10 to 0.37; P<0.001). Overall survival data were immature. Adverse events of grade 3 or higher occurred in 35.8% of the patients who received ensartinib (most commonly rash) and in 18.2% of those who received placebo.
abstract.textZh: 總共274名患者被隨機分配接受恩沙替尼或安慰劑（每組137名患者）。在24個月時，存活且無病的II至IIIB期疾病患者百分比在恩薩替尼組中為86.4% ，在安慰劑組中為53.5% （疾病復發或死亡的風險比為0.20 ； 95%可信區間[CI]為0.11至0.38 ； P < 0.001 ）。在整體患者族羣中，恩薩替尼組中存活且無疾病的患者百分比為87.3% ，安慰劑組中為57.2% （風險比， 0.20 ； 95% CI ， 0.10至0.37 ； P < 0.001 ）。整體存活數據不成熟。3級或以上的不良事件發生在35.8%接受恩沙替尼的患者（最常見的皮疹）和18.2%接受安慰劑的患者中。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with completely resected stage IB to IIIB ALK-positive NSCLC, the percentage of patients who were alive and disease-free at 24 months was significantly higher with ensartinib than with placebo. (Funded by Betta Pharmaceuticals; ELEVATE ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05341583.).
abstract.textZh: 在IB至IIIB期ALK陽性NSCLC完全切除的患者中，使用恩沙替尼的患者在24個月時存活且無疾病的百分比顯著高於使用安慰劑的患者。（由Betta Pharmaceuticals資助；提升ClinicalTrials.gov編號， NCT05341583。）

articles.titleZh: 恩沙替尼用於切除的ALK陽性非小細胞肺癌

articles.title: Setmelanotide for the Treatment of Acquired Hypothalamic Obesity
articles.authors: Miller JL, van Santen HM, Phillips SA, Hamilton J, Aberle J, Sathyapalan T, Mohamed Z, McCormack SE, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: A phase 2 trial of setmelanotide, a melanocortin-4 receptor agonist, showed substantial weight loss in patients with acquired hypothalamic obesity, but additional data are needed.
abstract.textZh: 一項黑皮質素-4受體激動劑setmelanotide的2期試驗顯示，後天性下丘腦肥胖患者的體重顯著減輕，但需要額外的數據。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a phase 3 trial in which participants were randomly assigned in a 2:1 ratio to receive setmelanotide (at a dose of 1.5 to 3.0 mg) or placebo administered subcutaneously once daily for 52 weeks after a dose-escalation period. Persons at least 4 years of age were potentially eligible for the trial if they had acquired hypothalamic obesity, which was defined by a body-mass index (BMI; the weight in kilograms divided by the square of the height in meters) that was at or above the 95th percentile for age and sex (for participants <18 years of age) or at least 30 (for participants ≥18 years of age) and a history of a hypothalamic tumor, lesion, or injury. The primary end point was the mean percent change in BMI from baseline to 52 weeks after the end of the dose-escalation period. Secondary end points included the mean change in the weekly average of the maximal daily hunger score (range, 0 to 10, with higher scores indicating more severe hunger), assessed in participants at least 12 years of age.
abstract.textZh: 我們進行了一項3期試驗，其中參與者以2 ： 1的比例隨機分配接受setmelanotide （劑量為1.5至3.0 mg ）或安慰劑，在劑量遞增期後每天皮下給藥一次，持續52週。 如果年齡至少4歲的人患有下丘腦肥胖症，則可能有資格參與試驗，其體重指數（ BMI ；以千克為單位的體重除以身高平方米）在年齡和性別上等於或高於第95百分位數（對於< 18歲的參與者）或至少30 （對於≥ 18歲的參與者） ，並且有下丘腦腫瘤、病變或損傷史。 主要終點是從基線到劑量遞增期結束後52週的BMI平均變化百分比。 次要終點包括在至少12歲的參與者中評估的每日最大飢餓評分的每週平均值平均變化（範圍為0至10 ，分數越高表示更嚴重的飢餓）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: From April 26, 2023, to March 18, 2025, a total of 120 participants were assigned to receive setmelanotide (81 participants) or placebo (39 participants). The mean (±SD) age was 19.9±13.8 years (range, 4 to 66). Among participants 18 years of age or older, the mean BMI was 41.2±9.7; the mean BMI z score among those younger than 18 years of age was 3.61±1.66. The least-squares mean (LSM) change in BMI at 52 weeks was -16.5% (95% confidence interval [CI], -19.3 to -13.8) with setmelanotide and 3.3% (95% CI, -0.6 to 7.2) with placebo (P<0.001), and the LSM change in the weekly average of maximal daily hunger scores was -2.73 (95% CI, -3.28 to -2.18) in the setmelanotide group and -1.45 (95% CI, -2.23 to -0.67) in the placebo group (P = 0.009). Adverse events were reported in 100% of the participants in the setmelanotide group and in 90% of those in the placebo group, and serious adverse events were reported in 28% and 8%, respectively. The most common adverse events with setmelanotide were skin hyperpigmentation, nausea, vomiting, and headache.
abstract.textZh: 從2023年4月26日至2025年3月18日，共有120名參與者被分配接受setmelanotide （ 81名參與者）或安慰劑（ 39名參與者）。 平均（ ±標準差）年齡為19.9 ± 13.8歲（範圍為4至66歲）。 在18歲或以上的參與者中，平均BMI為41.2 ± 9.7 ； 18歲以下參與者的平均BMI z評分為3.61 ± 1.66。 在52週時， BMI的最小平方平均值(LSM)變化是setmelanotide組為-16.5% (95%置信區間[CI] ， -19.3至-13.8) ，安慰劑組為3.3% (95% CI ， -0.6至7.2) (P < 0.001) ， setmelanotide組中每日最大飢餓評分的每週平均值LSM變化為-2.73 (95% CI ， -3.28至-2.18) ，安慰劑組為-1.45 (95% CI ， -2.23至-0.67) (P = 0.009)。 Setmelanotide組中100%的參與者報告了不良事件，安慰劑組中90%的參與者報告了不良事件，嚴重不良事件報告率分別為28%和8%。 Setmelanotide最常見的不良事件是皮膚色素沉著過度、噁心、嘔吐和頭痛。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Setmelanotide led to significantly greater reductions in BMI and hunger than placebo at 52 weeks among participants 4 to 66 years of age with acquired hypothalamic obesity. (Funded by Rhythm Pharmaceuticals; TRANSCEND ClincialTrials.gov number, NCT05774756.).
abstract.textZh: 在4至66歲後天性下丘腦肥胖的參與者中， Setmelanotide在52週時比安慰劑顯著降低了BMI和飢餓感。（由Rhythm Pharmaceuticals資助；超越ClincialTrials.gov編號， NCT05774756。）

articles.titleZh: Setmelanotide治療後天性下丘腦肥胖

articles.title: Phase 3 Trials of Inhaled Treprostinil for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis
articles.authors: Nathan SD, Smith P, Deng C, King CS, De Salvo M, Weigt SS, Pandya S, Bandyopadhyay D, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Two phase 3, randomized trials of inhaled treprostinil for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) were conducted on the basis of preclinical and clinical evidence of an antifibrotic mechanism. TETON-2 was completed first, and results were published; the results of TETON-1 and of both trials combined are reported here.
abstract.textZh: 根據抗纖維化機制的臨牀前和臨牀證據，進行了兩項吸入性曲前列環素治療特發性肺纖維化(IPF)的3期隨機試驗。首先完成TETON-2 ，並發表結果；此處報告TETON-1和兩項試驗的結果。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In the double-blind TETON-1 trial, we randomly assigned patients with IPF to receive inhaled treprostinil or placebo (12 breaths four times daily). The primary end point was the change in forced vital capacity (FVC) at week 52. Secondary end points, which were analyzed in a prespecified order to control for multiplicity, were clinical worsening (the first occurrence of death from any cause, hospitalization for a respiratory cause, or a relative decline of ≥10% in the percentage of predicted FVC) and acute exacerbation of IPF (each assessed in a time-to-event analysis), survival, change in percentage of predicted FVC, quality of life, and change in diffusion capacity of the lungs for carbon monoxide at week 52.
abstract.textZh: 在雙盲TETON-1試驗中，我們隨機分配IPF患者接受吸入性曲前列環素或安慰劑（每日四次，每次12次呼吸）。主要終點是第52週時用力肺活量(FVC)的變化。次要終點以預先指定的順序進行分析，以控制多重性，包括臨牀惡化（任何原因導致的首次死亡、因呼吸道原因住院，或預測FVC百分比相對下降≥ 10% ）和IPF急性加重（每個終點在事件時間分析中進行評估）、存活率、預測FVC百分比的變化、生活品質，以及第52週時一氧化碳肺擴散能力的變化。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 598 patients underwent randomization and received at least one dose of treprostinil (299 patients) or placebo (299 patients). Of these, 434 completed the assessments through week 52 (218 in the treprostinil group and 216 in the placebo group). The mean age of the patients was 73.0 years, 77.3% were men, and 77.6% were receiving background antifibrotic therapy; the percentage of predicted FVC at baseline was 74.6%. The median change in FVC at week 52 was -43.3 ml (95% confidence interval [CI], -92.1 to -9.1) with treprostinil and -196.2 ml (95% CI, -227.1 to -155.6) with placebo (difference, 130.1 ml; 95% CI, 82.2 to 178.1; P<0.001). Clinical worsening occurred in 95 patients (31.8%) with treprostinil and in 133 patients (44.5%) with placebo (hazard ratio, 0.67; 95% CI, 0.52 to 0.88; P = 0.003). No significant difference was observed in the time to an IPF exacerbation, and no further inferences regarding secondary end points were made. The most frequent adverse event was cough (reported in 54.8% of the patients in the treprostinil group and 33.1% patients in the placebo group). Discontinuation of treprostinil or placebo occurred in 40.5% and 32.8% of the patients, respectively, with adverse event being the primary reason (20.7% and 14.7%). Efficacy and safety outcomes were similar in analyses of the combined trial data.
abstract.textZh: 共有598名患者接受隨機分組，並接受至少一劑曲前列素（ 299名患者）或安慰劑（ 299名患者）。 其中， 434人完成了第52週的評估（曲前列素組218人，安慰劑組216人）。 患者的平均年齡為73.0歲， 77.3%為男性， 77.6%接受背景抗纖維化治療；基線時預測的FVC百分比為74.6%。 第52週FVC的中位數變化為-43.3 ml （ 95%置信區間[CI] ， -92.1至-9.1 ）曲前列素和安慰劑的-196.2 ml （ 95% CI ， -227.1至-155.6 ） （差異， 130.1 ml ； 95% CI ， 82.2至178.1 ； P < 0.001 ）。 曲前列素的95名患者(31.8%)和安慰劑的133名患者(44.5%)發生臨牀惡化(風險比為0.67 ； 95% CI為0.52至0.88 ； P = 0.003)。 在IPF急性發作期間未觀察到顯著差異，也未對次要終點作出進一步推斷。 最常見的不良事件是咳嗽（在曲前列素組54.8%的患者和安慰劑組33.1%的患者中報告）。 停用曲前列環素或安慰劑的患者分別為40.5%和32.8% ，不良事件為主要原因(20.7%和14.7%)。 在合併試驗資料的分析中，有效性和安全性結果相似。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In patients with IPF, treatment with inhaled treprostinil led to a smaller decline in FVC and fewer clinical-worsening events than placebo over the course of 52 weeks. (Funded by United Therapeutics; TETON-1 ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04708782.).
abstract.textZh: 在IPF患者中，與安慰劑相比，吸入性曲前列環素治療在52週期間導致FVC下降較小，臨牀惡化事件較少。（由United Therapeutics資助； TETON-1 ClinicalTrials.gov編號： NCT04708782。）

articles.title: Temocillin versus carbapenems for bacteraemia due to third-generation cephalosporin-resistant Enterobacterales in Spain (ASTARTÉ): a multicentre, phase 3, open-label, non-inferiority, randomised clinical trial
articles.authors: Dezza FC, Pulido LB, Borreguero IB, Pérez FD, Jiménez VP, de la Rosa Riestra S, Bravo-Ferrer JM, Palacios-Baena ZR, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Alternatives to carbapenems for the treatment of third-generation cephalosporin-resistant Enterobacterales (3GCR-E) are urgently needed to reduce the selection pressure posed by these drugs. Temocillin is a neglected narrow-spectrum β-lactam. The aim of the trial was to investigate if temocillin is non-inferior to carbapenems for the targeted treatment of bacteraemia due to 3GCR-E.
abstract.textZh: 迫切需要碳青黴烯類的替代品來治療第三代頭孢菌素耐藥腸杆菌（ 3GCR-E ） ，以減少這些藥物帶來的選擇壓力。替莫西林是一種被忽視的狹窄光譜β-內酰胺。該試驗的目的是調查替莫西林在靶向治療由3GCR-E引起的細菌血症方面是否不劣於碳青黴烯類。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This multicentre, phase 3, open-label, non-inferiority, randomised, pragmatic, investigator-initiated clinical trial was conducted in 29 Spanish hospitals. We randomly assigned patients with bacteraemia caused by 3GCR-E to receive intravenous temocillin (2 g every 8 h) or meropenem (1 g every 8 h; or ertapenem [1 g per day] if appropriate). Patients aged 18 years or older were eligible if they had monomicrobial bacteraemia due to any 3GCR-E that was susceptible to meropenem and temocillin and treatment for at least 4 days with an active intravenous drug was considered necessary. Randomisation (1:1) was stratified according to previous active drug and to source of infection; no blocks were used. The primary endpoint was clinical success (clinical cure, no need to stop or change the study drug because of adverse event or clinical failure, absence of recurrence, and survival by day 28) in all randomly assigned patients who received at least one dose of a study drug (modified intention-to-treat population [mITT]). Adverse events were assessed in the mITT population. No missing data were reported. A 10% non-inferiority margin was established. The trial was registered in ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04478721) and is complete and closed to new participants.
abstract.textZh: 這項多中心、3期、開放標籤、非劣效性、隨機、務實、研究者發起的臨牀試驗在29家西班牙醫院進行。 我們隨機分配由3GCR-E引起的細菌血症患者接受靜脈注射替莫西林（每8小時2g ）或美羅培南（每8小時1g ；或厄他培南[每天1g] ，如適用）。 18歲或以上的患者，如果由於任何易受美羅培南和替莫西林影響的3GCR-E引起的單微生物細菌血症，則符合資格，並且認為有必要使用活性靜脈注射藥物治療至少4天。 隨機分組（ 1 ： 1 ）根據先前的活性藥物和感染源進行分層；未使用塊。 主要終點是接受至少一劑研究藥物的所有隨機分配患者的臨牀成功率（臨牀治癒、無需因不良事件或臨牀失敗而停止或更改研究藥物、無復發，以及第28天的存活率） （改良的意向治療人羣[mITT] ）。 在mITT人羣中評估不良事件。 未報告遺漏資料。 建立了10%的非劣效性界限。 該試驗已在ClinicalTrials.gov （ NCT04478721 ）中註冊，已完成並對新參與者關閉。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: 334 eligible patients were enrolled between Dec 15, 2020, and Nov 29, 2024, of whom 328 were included in the mITT population (163 assigned temocillin and 165 assigned carbapenems). In 328 participants, the median age was 72 years (IQR 65-80), 106 (32%) were female, 222 (68%) were male, and the median Charlson Comorbidity Index was 2 (IQR 0-4). In the mITT population, clinical success occurred in 120 (74%) of 163 patients assigned temocillin and 121 (73%) of 165 patients assigned carbapenems (difference 0·3% [95% CI -7·7 to ∞]; non-inferiority p=0·017). Serious adverse events were reported in 31 (19%) of 163 patients assigned temocillin and 35 (24%) of 165 patients assigned carbapenems.
abstract.textZh: 在2020年12月15日至2024年11月29日期間招募了334名符合資格的患者，其中328名被納入mITT人羣（ 163名分配的替莫西林和165名分配的碳青黴烯類藥物）。在328名參與者中，中位年齡為72歲（ IQR 65-80 ） ， 106名（ 32 ％ ）為女性， 222名（ 68 ％ ）為男性，而Charlson合併症指數中位數為2 （ IQR 0-4 ）。在mITT族羣中，分配給替莫西林的163名患者中有120名(74%)發生臨牀成功，分配給碳青黴烯類的165名患者中有121名(73%)發生臨牀成功(差異為0 · 3% [95% CI -7 · 7至∞] ；非劣效性p = 0 · 017)。分配給替莫西林的163名患者中有31名(19%)報告了嚴重不良事件，分配給碳青黴烯類的165名患者中有35名(24%)報告了嚴重不良事件。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: In patients with bacteraemia caused by 3GCR-E, temocillin was non-inferior to carbapenems as targeted treatment. These findings support the use of temocillin as an effective and safe alternative to carbapenems in this setting.
abstract.textZh: 在由3GCR-E引起的細菌血症患者中，替莫西林作為靶向治療不劣於碳青黴烯類。這些發現支持在這種情況下使用替莫西林作為碳青黴烯類的有效和安全的替代品。

articles.title: Fixed-duration pirtobrutinib plus venetoclax-rituximab versus venetoclax-rituximab for patients with previously treated chronic lymphocytic leukaemia or small lymphocytic lymphoma (BRUIN CLL-322): an open-label, multicentre, randomised, controlled, phase 3 trial
articles.authors: Davids MS, Eyre TA, Woyach JA, Roeker LE, Ferrajoli A, Wang Y, Tam CS, Jurczak W, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Venetoclax-rituximab (VR) following covalent Bruton tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor therapy is the fixed-duration standard of care for patients with chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (including small lymphocytic lymphoma). Pirtobrutinib, a non-covalent BTK inhibitor, is approved for use after treatment with a covalent BTK inhibitor as a continuous therapy option. We aimed to evaluate the addition of pirtobrutinib to VR as a fixed-duration regimen in patients with relapsed or refractory chronic lymphocytic leukaemia.
abstract.textZh: 共價Bruton酪氨酸激酶（ BTK ）抑制劑治療後的Venetoclax-rituximab （ VR ）是慢性淋巴細胞白血病（包括小淋巴細胞淋巴瘤）患者的固定療程標準。Pirtobrutinib是一種非共價BTK抑制劑，被批準在使用共價BTK抑制劑作為連續治療選擇後使用。我們的目標是評估在復發或難治性慢性淋巴細胞白血病患者中，在VR中添加pirtobrutinib作為固定持續時間的治療方案。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This open-label, multicentre, randomised, controlled, phase 3 trial was conducted at 152 sites (comprising community hospitals and academic centres) across 22 countries. Eligible patients were aged 18 years or older, had a confirmed diagnosis of chronic lymphocytic leukaemia (including small lymphocytic lymphoma), and had previously been treated with at least one line of therapy that could include a covalent BTK inhibitor. Patients who had previously received a non-covalent BTK inhibitor, venetoclax, or another BCL2 inhibitor were not eligible. Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) using an interactive web-based randomisation system, stratified by del(17p) status and previous exposure to covalent BTK inhibitors, and assigned to receive either pirtobrutinib plus VR (PVR) or VR. Both groups received oral venetoclax (25 cycles) and intravenous rituximab (six cycles); the PVR group also received oral pirtobrutinib for 28 cycles, with a three-cycle pirtobrutinib-rituximab lead-in before venetoclax initiation. For this prespecified interim analysis, the primary endpoint was progression-free survival in the intention-to-treat population, assessed by a masked independent review committee (IRC) as per 2018 International Workshop on Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia guidelines. Safety analyses were conducted in the safety population, defined as all randomly assigned patients who took at least one dose of any study treatment. All analyses were based on a data cutoff date of Feb 2, 2026. The trial is registered at ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT04965493, and is ongoing but no longer recruiting.
abstract.textZh: 這項開放標籤、多中心、隨機、對照、3期試驗在22個國家的152個研究中心（包括社區醫院和學術中心）進行。 符合資格的患者年齡為18歲或以上，確診為慢性淋巴細胞白血病（包括小淋巴細胞淋巴瘤） ，且曾接受過至少一種可能包括共價BTK抑制劑的治療。 先前接受過非共價BTK抑制劑、venetoclax或其他BCL2抑制劑的患者不符合資格。 入組患者使用互動式網頁隨機分配系統隨機分配(1: 1) ，依據del (17p)狀態和既往共價BTK抑製劑暴露分層，並分配接受pirtobrutinib加VR (PVR)或VR。 兩組均接受口服venetoclax （ 25個週期）和靜脈注射利妥昔單抗（ 6個週期） ； PVR組還接受口服pirtobrutinib 28個週期，在venetoclax開始之前使用3個週期pirtobrutinib-rituximab導入。 對於這項預先指定的中期分析，主要終點是意向治療族羣的無惡化生存期，根據2018年慢性淋巴細胞白血病國際研討會指南，由蒙面獨立審查委員會(IRC)進行評估。 安全性分析在安全性族羣中進行，定義為所有隨機分配的患者至少服用一劑任何研究治療藥物。 所有分析均基於2月2日的數據截止日期，

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between Oct 13, 2021, and Oct 28, 2024, 784 patients were screened, of whom 639 were randomly assigned: 321 to the PVR group and 318 to the VR group. The median age of patients was 68·0 years (IQR 60·0-74·0), of whom 439 (69%) were male and 200 (31%) were female. The median number of previous therapies was 2 (IQR 1-3); 510 (80%) of 639 patients had previous exposure to covalent BTK inhibitors, of whom 362 (71%) discontinued their most recent drug of this class owing to progressive disease. At a median follow-up of 27·3 months (IQR 19·5-38·7), PVR showed a significant improvement in IRC-assessed progression-free survival compared with VR (hazard ratio 0·547 [95% CI 0·400-0·748]; p=0·0001). The median 24-month progression-free survival rate was 87% (95% CI 82·3-90·4) in the PVR group versus 72% (65·7-77·0) in the VR group, and the median progression-free survival was not reached (IQR 31·7-not estimable) in the PVR group versus 39·7 months (21·5-50·0) in the VR group. This benefit was consistent across prespecified subgroups, including patients with previous exposure to covalent BTK inhibitors. The most frequent treatment-emergent adverse event of any grade in both groups was diarrhoea, reported in 106 (34%) of 316 patients in the PVR group and 110 (35%) of 311 patients in the VR group. The frequency of treatment-emergent adverse events of grade 3 or higher was similar in both groups (249 [79%] of 316 patients in the PVR group vs 227 [73%] of 311 patients in the VR group); the rate of tumour lysis syndrome of grade 3 or higher was lower in the PVR group (1%; three of 316) than in the VR group (4%; 12 of 311). Rates of atrial fibrillation or flutter of any grade were low (11 [3%] of 316 patients in the PVR group vs eight [3%] of 311 patients in the VR group). Rates of treatment discontinuation owing to treatment-emergent adverse events deemed as related to any of the study drugs were similar: 5% (17 of 316 patients) in the PVR group versus 5% (16 of 311 patients) in the VR group. There were five treatment-related deaths: one in the PVR group and four in the VR group.
abstract.textZh: 在2021年10月13日至2024年10月28日期間，篩選了784名患者，其中639名患者被隨機分配： 321名分配到PVR組， 318名分配到VR組。 患者的中位年齡為68 · 0歲（ IQR 60 · 0-74 · 0 ） ，其中439人（ 69 ％ ）為男性， 200人（ 31 ％ ）為女性。 既往治療的中位數為2 (IQR 1-3) ； 639名患者中有510名(80%)既往接觸過共價BTK抑製劑，其中362名(71%)因疾病進展而停止使用此類最新藥物。 在中位隨訪27 · 3個月（ IQR 19 · 5-38 · 7 ）時，與VR相比， PVR顯示IRC評估的無惡化生存期顯著改善（風險比0 · 547 [95% CI 0 · 400-0 · 748] ； p = 0 · 0001 ）。 PVR組的中位24個月無惡化存活率為87% (95% CI 82 · 3-90 · 4) ， VR組為72% (65 · 7-77 · 0) ， PVR組未達到中位無惡化存活率(IQR 31 · 7-不可估計) ， VR組為39 · 7個月(21 · 5-50 · 0)。 這種益處在預先指定的次組中是一致的，包括以前曾接觸過共價BTK抑制劑的患者。 兩組中最常見的任何等級的治療中出現的不良事件是腹瀉，在PVR組的316名患者中有106名（ 34 ％ ）報告，在VR組的311名患者中有110名（ 35 ％ ）報告。 兩組中第3級或以上的治療中出現不良事件的頻率相似（ PVR組中316名患者中有249名[79 ％] ，而311名患者中有227名[73 ％]

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: In patients with previously treated chronic lymphocytic leukaemia, PVR showed significant improvement in progression-free survival compared with VR, with consistent results in patients who had previously received covalent BTK inhibitors and no new safety signals. To our knowledge, these results represent the first randomised phase 3 evidence comparing a novel fixed-duration regimen to the current standard of VR in relapsed or refractory chronic lymphocytic leukaemia, supporting PVR as a potential new standard of care.
abstract.textZh: 在先前治療的慢性淋巴細胞白血病患者中，與VR相比， PVR顯示無惡化生存期顯著改善，在先前接受共價BTK抑制劑的患者中結果一致，沒有新的安全性信號。據我們所知，這些結果是第一個隨機3期證據，將一種新的固定持續時間療法與當前復發或難治性慢性淋巴細胞白血病的VR標準進行比較，支持PVR作為一種潛在的新治療標準。

articles.titleZh: 對於先前治療的慢性淋巴細胞白血病或小淋巴細胞淋巴瘤（ BRUIN CLL-322 ）患者，固定期間的pirtobrutinib加venetoclax-rituximab與venetoclax-rituximab ：一項開放標籤、多中心、隨機、對照、3期試驗

articles.title: Formulary-Related Insurance Denials of Single-Source Branded Drugs in the United States
articles.authors: Levy JF, Alexander GC, Vabson B, Ippolito BN

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Formulary exclusions and drug utilization management, including prior authorization and step therapy, reduce drug spending but may limit timely treatment access.
abstract.textZh: 處方集排除和藥物使用管理，包括事先授權和步驟治療，可減少藥物支出，但可能會限制及時獲得治療。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate formulary-based rejections and subsequent dispensing of initial attempts to fill single-source branded drug prescriptions.
abstract.textZh: 估計基於處方集的拒絕和隨後最初嘗試填寫單一來源品牌藥物處方的分配。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND POPULATION
abstract.text: Retrospective, national, all-payer cohort study using IQVIA Formulary Impact Analyzer, which represents anonymized, patient-level, adjudicated US outpatient pharmacy claims, from January 2018 through September 2024. The study focused on 1.17 million individuals attempting to fill 2 million single-source branded drug prescriptions for the first time.
abstract.textZh: 從2018年1月到2024年9月，使用IQVIA處方集影響分析儀進行的回顧性、全國性、全付款人羣組研究，該研究代表匿名的、患者級別的、經裁定的美國門診藥房索賠。該研究的重點是117萬人首次嘗試填寫200萬個單一來源品牌藥物處方。

abstract.label: EXPOSURE
abstract.text: Attempt to fill a single-source branded drug prescription for the first time.
abstract.textZh: 首次嘗試填寫單一來源品牌藥物處方。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary outcomes were (1) rejection for formulary exclusion or utilization management (prior authorization or step therapy) of an initial prescription fill attempt and (2) failure of dispensing of the rejected molecule or another member of the same therapeutic class within 90 days of the initially attempted fill.
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是（ 1 ）因處方集排除或使用管理（事先授權或分步治療）而拒絕初始處方填充嘗試，以及（ 2 ）在最初嘗試填充後90天內未能分配被拒絕的分子或相同治療類別的其他成員。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among more than 2 million initial fill attempts (commercial insurance, 0.84 million; stand-alone Medicare prescription drug plan, 0.40 million; Medicare Advantage prescription drug plan, 0.39 million; Medicaid fee-for-service, 0.21 million; Medicaid managed care, 0.10 million; health insurance marketplace [exchange] plan, 0.06 million), 68.0% were paid on the initial fill attempt, while the remainder were rejected for formulary exclusion (14.8%) or rejected due to requiring prior authorization or step therapy, ie, utilization management (17.2%). Formulary-based rejections increased 67.4% over the time frame examined, from 24.3% (2018) to 40.7% (2024), and rejections were most common among exchange (48.7%) and Medicaid managed care (49.8%) compared with Medicare prescription drug plans (24.0%) and Medicare Advantage prescription drug plans (19.8%). Of the 32% of attempts that were initially rejected, 38.6% ultimately resulted in the rejected molecule being filled within 90 days and nearly half (48.4%) resulted in no medication fill in the same therapeutic class within that time frame. Treatment initiation was delayed an average of 12.2 days (SD, 17.8 days) after initial rejection among those ultimately receiving the same molecule or a therapeutic substitute.
abstract.textZh: 在超過200萬次初始填充嘗試（商業保險， 84萬次；獨立Medicare處方藥計劃， 40萬次； Medicare Advantage處方藥計劃， 39萬次； Medicaid收費服務， 21萬次； Medicaid管理式護理， 10萬次；健康保險市場[交易所]計劃， 06萬次）中， 68.0 ％在初始填充嘗試時支付，而其餘的因處方藥排除（ 14.8 ％ ）或因需要事先授權或步驟治療而被拒絕，即利用率管理（ 17.2 ％ ）。 與Medicare處方藥計劃（ 24.0 ％ ）和Medicare Advantage處方藥計劃（ 19.8 ％ ）相比，基於處方藥的拒絕增加了67.4 ％ ，從24.3 ％ （ 2018年）增加到40.7 ％ （ 2024年） ，最常見的是交換（ 48.7 ％ ）和Medicaid管理式護理（ 49.8 ％ ）。 在最初被拒絕的32 ％的嘗試中， 38.6 ％最終導致被拒絕的分子在90天內被填充，近一半（ 48.4 ％ ）導致在這段時間內沒有相同治療類別的藥物填充。 在最終接受相同分子或治療替代品的患者中，初始排斥後治療開始平均延遲12.2天（ SD ， 17.8天）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Among this large, diverse sample of individuals in the United States, formulary rejections were frequent and often resulted in delayed or absent treatment, highlighting trade-offs between cost and access to medicines.
abstract.textZh: 在美國這一龐大、多樣化的個人樣本中，處方集拒絕經常發生，並且經常導致治療延遲或缺席，突出了成本與藥物可及性之間的平衡。

articles.titleZh: 美國單一來源品牌藥的處方集相關保險拒絕

articles.title: Lung Transplant for Refractory Lung-Limited Stage IV Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
articles.authors: Bharat A, Kurihara C, Chung LI, Gao R, Kim S, Lung K, Myers C, Venkata Subramani M, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Patients with medically refractory, lung-limited, stage IV non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) often die of progressive respiratory failure. Although lung transplant offers the possibility of organ-level disease extirpation, the surgery has historically not been offered to such patients due to concerns of poor oncological outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 難治性、肺部受限、IV期非小細胞肺癌(NSCLC)患者通常死於進行性呼吸衰竭。儘管肺移植提供了器官級疾病根除的可能性，但由於擔心腫瘤結果不佳，這種手術在歷史上並未提供給這類患者。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To describe outcomes among patients who underwent lung transplant and examine survival associated with lung transplant compared with medical management alone.
abstract.textZh: 描述接受肺移植的患者的結局，並檢查與肺移植相關的存活率與單獨的醫療管理相比。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: This prospective, single-center, registry study included 404 adults. Of 98 adults with medically refractory, lung-limited, stage IV NSCLC, 17 underwent lung transplant and 81 met transplant eligibility criteria but did not undergo transplant due to nonbiologic barriers and were treated with medical management alone. There were 306 adults without cancer who underwent lung transplant for end-stage pulmonary disease. All who underwent lung transplant had respiratory failure. The study was conducted from September 1, 2021, through June 30, 2025; the last day of extended follow-up was January 31, 2026.
abstract.textZh: 這項前瞻性、單中心、註冊研究包括404名成人。在98名患有醫療難治性、肺部受限、IV期NSCLC的成年人中， 17人接受了肺移植， 81人符合移植資格標準，但由於非生物屏障而未接受移植，並且僅接受醫療管理。有306名未患癌症的成年人因末期肺部疾病接受了肺移植。所有接受肺移植的患者均有呼吸衰竭。本研究於2021年9月1日至2025年6月30日進行；延長追蹤的最後一天為2026年1月31日。

abstract.label: EXPOSURES
abstract.text: Lung transplant after contemporary staging and a dissemination-minimizing operative technique was used.
abstract.textZh: 使用同期分期後的肺移植和播散最小化手術技術。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary outcome was overall survival from eligibility evaluation completion in patients with NSCLC who underwent lung transplant vs those with NSCLC who were treated with medical management alone. The secondary outcome was 1-year posttransplant survival (organ stewardship comparison) in patients with NSCLC who underwent lung transplant vs those without cancer who underwent lung transplant.
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是接受肺移植的NSCLC患者與接受單獨醫療管理治療的NSCLC患者在完成資格評估後的總生存期。次要結果是接受肺移植的NSCLC患者與接受肺移植的非癌症患者的移植後1年存活率（器官管理比較）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among the 98 patients with stage IV NSCLC, the median follow-up from eligibility evaluation completion through June 30, 2025, was 343 (IQR, 191-768) days for the 17 lung transplant recipients (median age, 61.0 [IQR, 48.0-64.0] years; 10 [59%] were women) and the median follow-up was 221 (IQR, 68-386) days for the 81 patients who received medical management alone (median age, 63.4 [IQR, 56.7-68.1] years; 42 [52%] were women). Among the 306 lung transplant recipients without cancer, the median follow-up from transplant was 200 (IQR, 126-496) days (median age, 63.0 [IQR, 55.0-68.8] years; 112 [37%] were women). The Kaplan-Meier estimated 1-year overall survival was 100.0% (95% CI, 63.1%-100.0%) (0 deaths) among the lung transplant recipients with NSCLC vs 40.8% (95% CI, 29.6%-53.1%) (52 deaths) among those with NSCLC who received medical management alone (absolute difference, 59.2 [95% CI, 46.2-71.7] percentage points). The 1-year posttransplant survival was 100% (95% CI, 63.1%-100%) among patients with NSCLC vs 88.1% (95% CI, 83.7%-91.4%) among patients without cancer (absolute difference, 11.9 [90% CI, 9.1-15.5] percentage points). At the extended follow-up (January 31, 2026), 2 of the transplant recipients with stage IV NSCLC had died.
abstract.textZh: 在98名IV期NSCLC患者中， 17名肺移植受者（中位年齡， 61.0 [IQR ， 48.0-64.0]歲； 10 [59%]為女性）從資格評估完成到2025年6月30日的中位隨訪時間為343 （ IQR ， 191-768 ）天， 81名單獨接受醫療管理的患者（中位年齡， 63.4 [IQR ， 56.7-68.1]歲； 42 [52%]為女性）的中位隨訪時間為221 （ IQR ， 68-386 ）天。 在306名沒有癌症的肺移植受者中，移植後的中位隨訪時間為200 (IQR ， 126-496)天(中位年齡， 63.0 [IQR ， 55.0-68.8]歲； 112 [37%]為女性)。 Kaplan-Meier估計， NSCLC肺移植受者1年總生存率為100.0% （ 95% CI ， 63.1% -100.0% ） （ 0例死亡） ，而單獨接受醫療治療的NSCLC患者為40.8% （ 95% CI ， 29.6% -53.1% ） （ 52例死亡） （絕對差異， 59.2 [95% CI ， 46.2-71.7]個百分點）。 NSCLC患者的1年移植後存活率為100% （ 95% CI ， 63.1% -100% ） ，而非癌症患者為88.1% （ 95% CI ， 83.7% -91.4% ） （絕對差異， 11.9 [90% CI ， 9.1-15.5]個百分點）。 在延長追蹤（ 2026年1月31日）時， 2名IV期NSCLC移植受者死亡。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Among selected patients with medically refractory, lung-limited, stage IV NSCLC and respiratory failure who underwent lung transplant, early survival was favorable. Longer-term follow-up and quality-of-life assessment are needed.
abstract.textZh: 在接受肺移植的醫學難治性、肺部受限、IV期NSCLC和呼吸衰竭的選定患者中，早期生存是有利的。需要長期追蹤和生活品質評估。
